---
permalink: /llms.txt
---
# Skill Patterns

> Reusable, composable techniques for shaping how an AI agent behaves — {{ site.patterns | size }} patterns across {{ site.data.categories | size }} categories. When creating or improving a Skill, apply the patterns whose purpose matches the task; each entry includes an example prompt you can adapt. Most skills use 2–4 patterns — don't over-apply. Site: {{ '/' | absolute_url }}
{% assign cats = site.data.categories | sort: "order" %}{% for cat in cats %}
## {{ cat.title }}
{{ cat.description }}
{% assign pats = site.patterns | where: "category", cat.key | sort_natural: "title" %}{% for p in pats %}
### {{ p.title }}
{{ p.summary }}
- What it adds: {% for a in p.adds %}{{ a }}{% unless forloop.last %}; {% endunless %}{% endfor %}.
- Example prompt: {{ p.prompt | strip_newlines }}
- URL: {{ p.url | absolute_url }}
{% endfor %}{% endfor %}
